string.name: empty_config_desc
string.value: You can import a WireGuard configuration via QR code, file, or clipboard.

string.name: dialog_reveal_key_message
string.value: The private key controls this VPN identity. Do not screenshot, forward, or paste it into untrusted apps.

string.name: dialog_export_config_message
string.value: The exported configuration contains the private key. Anyone with this file can use this tunnel.

string.name: dialog_copy_report_message
string.value: Logs are always redacted before being copied to the system clipboard.

string.name: dialog_delete_config_message
string.value: This will delete the locally saved WireGuard configuration and key references. This action cannot be undone.

string.name: error_ipv6_endpoint_unsupported
string.value: This version does not support IPv6 Endpoints

string.name: error_ipv6_address_unsupported
string.value: This version does not support IPv6 Interface addresses

string.name: error_ipv6_dns_unsupported
string.value: This version does not support IPv6 DNS addresses

string.name: error_invalid_keepalive
string.value: PersistentKeepalive must be between 0 and 65535 seconds

string.name: error_empty_allowed_ips
string.value: No routing range configured; may not reach target network after connecting

string.name: error_ipv4_route_required
string.value: This version requires at least one IPv4 route

string.name: error_qr_scan
string.value: Unable to scan the QR code

string.name: error_qr_not_supported
string.value: QR scanning is unavailable. Import a file or paste the configuration.

string.name: error_save_config
string.value: Unable to save. Please try again.

string.name: error_save_setting
string.value: Unable to save the setting. Please try again.

string.name: error_delete_config
string.value: Unable to delete. Please try again.

string.name: error_stop_vpn
string.value: Unable to disconnect. The configuration was kept.

string.name: error_disconnect_before_delete
string.value: Disconnect this tunnel before deleting it

string.name: error_export_report
string.value: There are no runtime logs to copy

string.name: error_copy_failed
string.value: Unable to copy. Please try again.

string.name: hint_paste_config
string.value: Paste the configuration below. The app does not read your clipboard directly.

string.name: risk_global_proxy
string.value: This configuration will route all network traffic

string.name: risk_global_proxy_v4
string.value: This configuration will route all IPv4 traffic

string.name: risk_global_proxy_v6
string.value: This configuration will route all IPv6 traffic

string.name: risk_no_dns
string.value: No DNS configured; may still use local DNS after connecting

string.name: risk_no_keepalive
string.value: Keepalive may be needed in mobile/NAT environments

string.name: risk_domain_endpoint
string.value: Domain will be resolved during connection

string.name: risk_auto_mtu
string.value: Auto MTU or default value will be used

string.name: hint_select_config_detail
string.value: Select a configuration to view details

string.name: option_status_bar_traffic
string.value: Show traffic in the status bar

string.name: desc_scan_qr
string.value: Scan a WireGuard configuration QR code

string.name: desc_create_manual
string.value: Enter Interface and Peer settings manually

string.name: toast_file_not_impl
string.value: File import is not available yet

string.name: toast_qr_not_impl
string.value: QR scanning is not available yet

string.name: diag_configuration_valid
string.value: Keys, Address, and MTU formats are valid

string.name: diag_configuration_invalid
string.value: A required key, Address, or MTU is invalid

string.name: diag_configuration_suggestion
string.value: Edit the configuration and fix marked fields

string.name: diag_endpoint_ipv4
string.value: Endpoint uses a valid IPv4 address: %s

string.name: diag_endpoint_invalid
string.value: The Endpoint address or port is invalid

string.name: diag_endpoint_resolve_failed
string.value: The hostname returned no usable IPv4 address

string.name: diag_endpoint_resolve_suggestion
string.value: Check the network, hostname, or DNS settings

string.name: diag_endpoint_ipv6_unsupported
string.value: The current runtime does not support IPv6 Endpoints

string.name: diag_endpoint_ipv4_suggestion
string.value: Use IPv4 or a hostname that resolves to IPv4

string.name: diag_routes_ipv4_required
string.value: The current runtime requires at least one IPv4 route

string.name: diag_routes_suggestion
string.value: Edit AllowedIPs and use valid CIDRs

string.name: diag_dns_default
string.value: Not set; runtime default DNS 8.8.8.8 will be used

string.name: diag_dns_suggestion
string.value: Edit the configuration and enter valid DNS addresses

string.name: diag_runtime_disconnected
string.value: Tunnel is disconnected; connect to verify a handshake

string.name: diag_runtime_connecting
string.value: Tunnel is starting and waiting for a handshake

string.name: diag_runtime_suggestion
string.value: Check recent logs and the server configuration

string.name: diag_runtime_waiting_handshake
string.value: Tunnel started, but no successful handshake was observed

string.name: diag_runtime_handshake
string.value: Connected; latest handshake was %d second(s) ago

string.name: diag_runtime_handshake_stale
string.value: Latest handshake is over %d seconds old; session health is unconfirmed

string.name: diag_ipv6_unsupported
string.value: The configuration includes IPv6, but this runtime only handles IPv4

string.name: diag_ipv6_suggestion
string.value: IPv6 entries are not applied; this is not IPv6 leak prevention

string.name: diag_ipv6_not_requested
string.value: The configuration does not request IPv6 routes

string.name: open_source_desc
string.value: This app uses the following open-source projects:

string.name: privacy_desc
string.value: This app processes WireGuard configurations only on your device. Private keys and configurations are never uploaded and remain in local storage.
